## Change

- What changed?
- Which public behavior or repository contract does it affect?

## Evidence

- [ ] Validation passes locally
- [ ] Tests/evaluations are included or not applicable
- [ ] Compatibility claims match smoke-test evidence
- [ ] No private paths, repositories, customer data, prompts, outputs, or credentials are included
- [ ] Provenance and third-party notices are complete

## Promotion-only checks

- [ ] Proposal and human approval are linked
- [ ] `catalog/skills.yaml` and Collections are updated
- [ ] `evidence/<skill>.yaml` is included
- [ ] Previous canonical implementation was removed or reduced to a profile/pointer
